'''鈭歯g-r-s-l''' ('''kangarseloko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wot|wot]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-r-s-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wot|wot]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯g-r-s-l
|-
! Lemma
| kangarseloko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thingarseloko|thingarseloko]] || [[word:jingarseloko|jingarseloko]] || [[word:shingarseloko|shingarseloko]] || [[word:kingarseloko|kingarseloko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thongarseloko|thongarseloko]] || [[word:jongarseloko|jongarseloko]] || [[word:shongarseloko|shongarseloko]] || [[word:kongarseloko|kongarseloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙ngarseloko|th忙ngarseloko]] || [[word:j忙ngarseloko|j忙ngarseloko]] || [[word:sh忙ngarseloko|sh忙ngarseloko]] || [[word:k忙ngarseloko|k忙ngarseloko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thangarseloko|thangarseloko]] || [[word:jangarseloko|jangarseloko]] || [[word:shangarseloko|shangarseloko]] || [[word:kangarseloko|kangarseloko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
